response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of professional C/C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) versus the 5-10 years required, no demonstrated Windows platform C++ development, no SQL Server or Oracle experience (only MongoDB/MySQL/generic SQL listed), and zero financial services, capital markets, or fixed-income domain exposure. Their strengths lie in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/GIS systems, which do not align with this role's mandatory requirements.
strengths: Long, varied senior-level software engineering career with strong fundamentals and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Some past C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a C IDE product
Excellent written communication evidenced by talks, workshops, and open source work
concerns: C++ experience is roughly 6 months and over a decade old, far below the 5-10 year mandatory bar
No Windows-platform C++, SQL Server, or Oracle experience evident in resume
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background

key_factors.factor: No fixed income or capital markets domain exposure
